title: Fix lichen-ipv6 no_std unit tests
description: Enable/import std correctly for crate unit tests while retaining no_std production behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Direct cargo test -p lichen-ipv6 succeeds under crate configuration.
close_reason: Added test-only std linkage under the no_std crate attribute. Direct cargo test -p lichen-ipv6 passes 13 unit tests and docs.
